programme.title: Tosh.0: Carnival
programme.desc: Daniel förklarar varför sås är höstens officiella dryck, och killen som gav bort alla sina besparingar i utbyte mot en banan med dreadlocks får en nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Force Field Master
programme.desc: Daniel undersöker USA:s värsta skola och killen som kan skapa kraftfält får en nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Competitive Sushi Eater
programme.desc: Det blir mycket tugg när Daniel intervjuar en tävlingsätare. Dessutom tar han sig en titt på kvinnliga musiker och lär sig om blommor och bin.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Redemption Reunion Spectacular: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Redemption Reunion Spectacular: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Daniel kollar hur det går för folk som fått nätupprättelse, visar sina tidiga reklamfilmer och tar reda på vad unga pojkar gör när de är ensamma.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Headbanger Workout
programme.desc: Daniel visar att sprit och elektricitet aldrig är en bra kombination och programmet får sin sexigaste nätupprättelse nånsin.

programme.title: Tosh.0: How to Teach
programme.desc: Daniel stödjer den första kvinnliga presidentkandidaten, recensenter på Yelp talar om vad Comedy Central gör fel och en gräsrökande elev får nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Security Officer Jay
programme.desc: Daniel blir galen över Movember, vill rena sig och en väktare får nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Happy Birthday, Katie
programme.desc: Daniel hjälper en snäll kille att bli mer än bara en vän, driver med rika idioter på Instagram och avslöjar resultatet av sitt aidstest.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Bad Impressions
programme.desc: Daniel gör er thanksgiving extra queer, ger er möjligheten att få en alldeles egen del av Tosh-imperiet och ger en urusel imitatör nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ostomy Bag Girl
programme.desc: Daniel uppfinner ett spel som får Hasbros Parker brothers att skälva av rädsla, visar ett julkort som garanterat förstör julen, och USA:s favoritanaltjej får en nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Web Reflection
programme.desc: Daniel visar sina favoritklipp från årets galningar och öppnar julkort från sina fans.

programme.title: Tosh.0: We Buy Golf
programme.desc: Daniel återinför 'Sport eller konsekvens', reder ut mysteriet med vem hans far är och visar den sexigaste nätupprättelsen nånsin.

programme.title: Tosh.0: IceJJFish
programme.desc: Daniel går på dejt, skänker bort sin bil och den sammetsröstade sångaren IceJJFish får sin nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Take No Orders
programme.desc: Daniel försöker göra alla hem i USA till offentliga toaletter, har en utmaning censuren kommer att avsky och killen som inte tar order från kvinnor får nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ben's Video Resume
programme.desc: Daniel ger C-SPAN bättre tittarsiffror genom att tala i Kongressen, lunchar med en hemlös kille och en ung jobbsökande får nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Boomer the Dog
programme.desc: Daniel anställer nätets mest kränkande advokat, spelar en störande version av Sätta svansen på åsnan och en hund fångad i en manskropp får nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Model Teacher
programme.desc: Daniel tvingar publiken att dricka nåt han gjort på toaletten och säljer sig för dyra hörlurar - och en lärarinna får nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Prancing Elites
programme.desc: Daniel gör världen fri från homofobi med hjälp av The Prancing Elites, förvandlar era förfärliga tweetar till en barnbok, och berör ett fan känslomässigt.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Comedian Daniel Songer
programme.desc: Daniel visar varför man aldrig ska ta med sin flickvän på ett sportevenemang, och en 49-årig nybliven komiker får upprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Misses Every Layup
programme.desc: Daniel ser hur mycket citrus det mänskliga ögat tål och lär en man att spela basket.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Roof Jump
programme.desc: Daniel visar hur man höjer ribban med hashtaggar samt pratar med den lyckligaste och läbbigaste killen i LA - och tjejen som vill att internet ska betala för hennes skador får nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Spoken Word Fail
programme.desc: Daniel hjälper en religiös rappare att återfå sin plats på tronen, visar oss att det inte finns några dumma frågor (bara dumma tjejer) och provar lite 'ganj'.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Banned from Walmart
programme.desc: Daniel kastar hästskor på kvinnor och läcker sina privata konversationer till pressen. Dessutom får USA:s snålaste man nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Nana Nana Subaru Winner
programme.desc: Daniel avslöjar vem som vunnit hans gamla Subaru och varför man aldrig bör däcka hemma hos honom.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Space Shuttle Launch
programme.desc: Daniel begraver "spadtjejen" för gott, delar med sig av fansens "Twisdomsord" till 2014 års studenter och rymdfärjekillen får nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Perfect Game Bowler
programme.desc: Daniel webbchattar med en get och en bowlare som missade sin chans att få högsta poäng får nätupprättelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Summertime Is Great
programme.desc: Daniel firar slutet på sommaren med att ge en pinsam familj nätupprättelse, jagar folk som tagit till sjappen och visar oss sitt mest erotiska klädval hittills.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Lingerie Football Coach
programme.desc: Daniel träffar den enda mannen i världen som bryr sig om damsporter, tar itu med en självskärare på kontoret och firar återkomsten av "Är det rasistiskt?".

programme.desc: Tosh pratar med Vine-gangstan Bryan Silva, Big Ass Baby hamnar i en skitsituation och Daniel läcker nakenbilder på sina fans.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Nano
programme.desc: RoboCop battles a scientist and a former I.R.S agent using microscopic machines to create the ultimate crime.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Corporate Raiders
programme.desc: The city is rocked by anti-corporate violence when RoboCop and Officer Madigan are assigned to bring in a charming ex-terrorist.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Midnight Minus One
programme.desc: RoboCop and Officer Madigan race the clock to prove a murderer is innocent before being executed in front of millions of television viewers.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Public Enemies
programme.desc: RoboCop must save the President and the First Knight from an assassination plot hatched by Dr. Mallardo, Chip Chayken and Pudface Morgan.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: The Future of Law Enforcement
programme.desc: RoboCop is back to bring justice to Delta City. While investigating the murders of several homeless people, he discovers the city's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Framed for the murder of a popular TV evangelist, RoboCop becomes a fugitive from the law as he and Madigan race against time to find the real killer.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Trouble in Delta City
programme.desc: When Madigan gets hooked on a new weight loss product, RoboCp uncovers an insidious plot by evil genius Dr. Cray Mallardo.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Officer Missing
programme.desc: RoboCop's rescue of a young man in need of a lung transplant is thwarted by a ruthless criminal who steals the organ to sell on the black market.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: What Money Can't Buy
programme.desc: When OCP institutes cost-cutting nighttime blackouts, a roving gang terrorizes the dark streets.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Ghosts of War
programme.desc: When a group of mentally unstable war veterans steal a secret weapon, RoboCop must race against time to save Diana from destruction.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Zone Five
programme.desc: To combat an epidemic of a narcotic called FUN, OCP recruits a gang of vigilantes, but RoboCop discovers the gang's sinister plot to flood the city with drugs.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Provision 22
programme.desc: When OCP privatizes the welfare system, RoboCop learns that Nancy is leading a group of people protesting the corporation's methods, making her a target.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Faces of Eve
programme.desc: Evil psychopath Pudface Morgan and his gang use OCP's latest cosmetic product, EVE, to unleash a crime wave in the city.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: When Justice Falls
programme.desc: RoboCop and Officer Madigan race to save the lives of four astronauts as they go head-to-head against a flamboyant corporate raider.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: When Justice Falls
programme.desc: RoboCop and Officer Madigan race to save the lives of four astronauts as they go head-to-head against a flamboyant corporate raider.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: The Human Factor
programme.desc: RoboCop teams up with his unsuspecting father to stop a mad bomber from unleashing a campaign of terror that could end in nuclear Armageddon.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: The Human Factor
programme.desc: RoboCop teams up with his unsuspecting father to stop a mad bomber from unleashing a campaign of terror that could end in nuclear Armageddon.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: Inside Crime
programme.desc: Pudface earns ratings for OCP's new reality show following the exploits of criminals, but has plans to take on RoboCop live on television.

programme.desc: Pudface earns ratings for OCP's new reality show following the exploits of criminals, but has plans to take on RoboCop live on television.

programme.title: Robocop: The Series: RoboCop vs Commander Cash
programme.desc: RoboCop faces his most formidable opponent, a madman who believes he is a live-action version of the OCP superhero, Commander Cash.

programme.desc: A local arms dealer finds his business hit by raids launched by the police and Robocop, so he hires an assassin known as "The Wizard" to carry out a special "assignment" against the president of the OPC.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James West and Artemus Gordon must stop a gargantuan cannon that has turned one town into dust and is now aimed at Denver.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon help a frightened sheriff defend his town against an attack by an army of cutthroats.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night of the Legion of Death
programme.desc: West and Gordon try to stop a territorial governor who runs his domain with dictatorial power.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A villainous art collector masterminds a plot to turn agent James West against the Secret Service.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Iron Fist
programme.desc: West and Gordon battle an assortment of characters to extradite a Bosnian Nobleman back to his homeland to face trial.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Running Death
programme.desc: Secret agents James West and Artemus Gordon join a wagon train of entertainers in their search for a mysterious assassin.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An over-ambitious general plans to rise to the presidency of the U.S. because of his reputation as a ruthless Indian fighter.

programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Headless Woman
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon work to avert the destruction of the American Cotton industry.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon struggle to bring to justice a weirdly garbed, artillery-equipped gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Death Masks
programme.desc: A murderer trapped by agent James T. West breaks out of prison with a bizarre plan to assassinate him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter voodoo rites and a diabolical biologist and his throng of robot-like slaves.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's sofa are Hollywood stars Chris Hemsworth and Paul Rudd, Oscar-winner Julianne Moore, and Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington, who discuss the final season of `Game of Thrones'. With music from Tom Walker, who performs `Just You and I'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's sofa are movie royalty Sir Michael Caine and Morgan Freeman, both starring in `Going in Style', comedian Jack Whitehall and Gemma Whelan from `Game of Thrones' who are in BBC drama `Decline and Fall', and Take That.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined by Harrison Ford and Ryan Gosling, who star together in `Blade Runner 2049', Margot Robbie, who is starring in `Goodbye Christopher Robin', and Reese Witherspoon, who stars in romantic comedy `Home Again'. Plus music from Bananarama.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests on Graham's sofa include multi-Oscar-nominated actor Bradley Cooper, pop superstar Lady Gaga, `Doctor Who' star Jodie Whittaker, and double Oscar nominee Ryan Gosling. Plus, music and chat from the legendary Rod Stewart.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guest host Jack Whitehall welcomes `Star Wars' and `Game of Thrones' star Gwendoline Christie, footballing great Peter Crouch, `Beauty and the Beast' actor Luke Evans, and best-selling author and comedian David Walliams. Plus, music from Sam Fender.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on his festive sofa are Will Smith, starring in police drama `Bright', Jenna Coleman, who appears in the `Victoria' Christmas special, and Jamie Oliver, talking about his new book, `5 Ingredients'. With music from Tom Chaplin.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined by oscar-winning Hollywood superstar Russell Crowe, screen siren Cameron Diaz, comic actor and director Richard Ayoade, and Kylie Minogue.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa among others are Hollywood superstar Will Smith, starring in football drama `Concussion' and Ryan Reynolds, reprising his superhero role in the new X-Men film `Deadpool'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests include Hollywood megastar Tom Cruise, his `Mission: Impossible 6' co-stars Henry Cavill and Rebecca Ferguson, and British actor and writer Simon Pegg. Plus, music and chat from Paloma Faith, who performs `Til I'm Done'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Hollywood stars Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, together in `La La Land', as well as actor and director Ben Affleck and British star Sienna Miller together in the crime film `Live By Night'. Plus, music from Gregory Porter.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham talks to the stars of `Mary Poppins Returns', `Sicario' actor Emily Blunt, `Hamilton' creator Lin-Manuel Miranda, `James Bond' star Ben Whishaw and `The Newsroom' actor Emily Mortimer.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's sofa tonight: Hollywood heart-throb Colin Farrell; controversial petrol-head Jeremy Clarkson; top comedian Jo Brand; X-Factor judge Sharon Osbourne, talking about her new autobiography; and Arcade Fire perform `After Life'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Making her first British chat-show appearance in 42 years, Dame Maggie Smith with Alex Jennings, four-time Oscar-nominated Bradley Cooper, British star Sienna Miller with chat and music from Justin Bieber.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Hollywood legend Robert de Niro, and Oscar-Winning co-star Anne Hathaway from the new movie, `The Intern'. Director and actor Sir Kenneth Branagh also joins Graham on the sofa.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
